blended.narrative: Tremblant is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light rain showers, highs of 46°F.
Wednesday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 8" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
